domain.description: The primary domain name for which the ACM certificate is being requested.

key_types.description: A set of key types to use for the ACM certificate, such as RSA or ECC.

most_recent.description: If set to true, retrieves only the most recently issued ACM certificate.

statuses.description: A list of statuses to filter the ACM certificates, such as ISSUED or PENDING_VALIDATION.

types.description: A list of types of ACM certificates, such as AMAZON_ISSUED or IMPORTED.
